welcome.title:

welcome.description: Unesite iznos jednom i gledajte kako se svaka valuta trenutno ažurira.

features.title: Uvijek pravi tečaj, bilo gdje
features.description: 150+ valuta, gotovo tečajevi u stvarnom vremenu i potpuno offline.

getStarted.title: Povijest tečajeva na prvi pogled
getStarted.description: Dodirnite bilo koju valutu za istraživanje povijesti tečajeva kroz tjedne, mjesece ili prošlu godinu.

common.interrupted: The session stopped when audio focus or the app state changed.
common.error: Audio could not start. Check the current output and try again.
common.gradualVolume: Start at a low device volume and raise it gradually. Keep the speaker away from your ears.

eject.subtitle: A low-frequency sweep may help move water and loose debris from the speaker.
eject.idleHint: Place the device speaker-side down before starting.
eject.runningHint: Keep the device still and away from your ears while the sweep plays.
eject.completedHint: Test your speaker and repeat the cycle if the sound is still muffled.
eject.externalBody: Water eject works through the device speaker, not headphones or Bluetooth outputs.
eject.howBody: The cycle repeatedly sweeps from 150 to 220 Hz with a smooth pulse designed to vibrate the speaker membrane. Results vary by device.

tone.subtitle: Generate a precise sine tone and explore the audible frequency range.
tone.swipeHint: Swipe across the waveform or use the slider to adjust frequency.

stereo.subtitle: Check left and right channel separation with a controlled 700 Hz tone.
stereo.positionLeft: Playing mostly through the left channel
stereo.positionRight: Playing mostly through the right channel
stereo.headphonesBody: Channel separation is easier to identify with headphones. Device-speaker results depend on the hardware and current output route.

meter.subtitle: Estimate the sound level around you while the microphone is active.
meter.permissionBody: Allow microphone access in system settings to estimate nearby sound levels.
meter.privacyBody: Audio samples are analyzed in memory and are never recorded, saved, or uploaded.
meter.disclaimer: Estimated readings vary by device and are not a calibrated, medical, or hearing-safety instrument.

guidance.normal: The estimated sound level is in a typical range.
guidance.loud: Prolonged exposure may affect your hearing.
guidance.danger: Move to a quieter place and protect your hearing.

safety.title: Audio Safety & Privacy
safety.intro: Use these tools carefully and understand what your phone can—and cannot—measure.
safety.playbackBody: Start at low volume, raise it gradually, keep the speaker away from your ears, and stop if a sound is uncomfortable.
safety.routingBody: Water-eject sound must use the device speaker. Stereo separation depends on the connected speaker or headphones.
safety.estimateBody: Phone microphones report digital signal level rather than laboratory SPL. The app applies an estimate that varies by device.
safety.calibrationBody: Compare the meter with a trusted reference in the same position, then adjust the calibration offset in Settings.
safety.privacyBody: The microphone runs only while the dB Meter is active. Samples are processed in memory and are never saved or uploaded.
safety.limitationsBody: This app cannot guarantee water removal and must not replace calibrated equipment, medical advice, or professional hearing protection guidance.
